subject: WF Ingress support for SDC deployment
commit_message:
WF Ingress support for SDC deployment

1. WF Ingress support for SDC deployment
2. By default the ingress is disabled

Change-Id: I35943a0100cdee5a3b1dab4a37bb31998f2cbec9
Issue-ID: OOM-1686
Signed-off-by: priyanshua <pagarwal@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

This is a great first contribution to Ingress. Thank you!

A necessary evolution of this work would be to introduce a global.ingress.enabled flag and an associated _ingress.tpl (e.g. common.ingress). The global flag can be added to the ONAP parent helm chart. The 'common.ingress' template would then be used at the top of an ingress.yaml to allow for global enablement of ingress for all helm charts - with ability to override with the ingress.enabled flag for any of the helm charts. I have raised a Jira to track this addition https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-1690. It is unassigned so please feel free to pick this up if so desired :)
Mike.
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
